# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Only the latest release of `nordkit/svea` receives security fixes.

| Version | Supported |
|---------|-----------|
| Latest  | ✅        |
| Older   | ❌        |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

**Please do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.**

Report vulnerabilities privately via [GitHub Security Advisories](https://github.com/nordkit/svea/security/advisories/new).

Include as much detail as possible:
- A description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- Potential impact
- Any suggested fix (optional)

You can expect an acknowledgement within **48 hours** and a resolution or status update within **7 days**.
